title: psychotria prunifolia
intro: Psychotria prunifolia, also known as the "prune leaf" or "marama", is a plant species native to Hawaii and other Pacific Island regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psychotria prunifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make topical applications, such as creams and salves, for skin conditions like eczema and acne.
